Dot Map Maker

Create galaxy maps, fantasy worlds, tabletop campaigns, or node-based adventures.

Example maps

Load a preset to explore features — timeline, routes, play mode, milestones, and more.

—

Play mode — mark progress only. Switch to Editor to change setup.

Unlock requires

If empty and locked: unlocks when a connected neighbor is completed.

Encounters

Idioma

Select a system on the map to edit it.

Node Editor

F2 to rename. Updates routes and unlock refs.

Puntos = miles (300.000). También 12M, 30 B, ~30 mil millones al importar.

Iconos sobre el sistema en el mapa. Abajo a la izquierda: mostrar/ocultar iconos y textos.

Nave + número por imperio (color del dueño). «+ Add fleet» usa el dueño del sistema. El año de vista y la timeline también cambian las flotas visibles.

Occupied: legal owner stays; red stripes = military occupier.

Owner editor

Factions on the map: color, name, and short tag (labels & stats).

Edit owner

Leader

Ruler or head of government for this faction (lore / narrative).

Changes save automatically.

Owners file

Map Controls

Calendar

Used for new timeline/route events and leader age reference. Saved in export JSON (metadata.defaultYear).

Installation icon legend

Changes auto-save in this browser.

Map validation

Checks IDs, routes, unlock refs, and capitals.

    Galaxy calendar

    Same as Map → Calendar. Import restores this from metadata.defaultYear when present.

    System timeline

    Events ≤ view year (top-left) change the map. Colonized = appears; Owner change = conquest; Abandoned = hidden.

    System: —

    Select a system to add historical events.

    Add / edit event

    Tipo Fleet change: dueño + cantidad abajo.

    Tipo Fleet movement: mueve flotas al destino. Actor = imperio.

    Events save automatically when the title is filled in.

    Galaxy chronicle

    All system and route events, sorted by year. Click an entry to jump to that year.

    Hyperlane editor

    Shift+click two systems to create a lane. Click a line on the map to edit it.

    Select a hyperlane on the map.

    Route: —

    Route data saves automatically.

    Route timeline

    Open / close the lane at a given year (affects map at view year).

    Add / edit route event

    Route events save automatically when the title is filled in.

    By owner

    Live summary from all systems on the map.

    Ayuda
